_comment: Copy to ariadne.config.json and edit. Paths are resolved relative to this file. Each repo declares zero or more scanners; a scanner is either a string (the type) or an object with `type` plus extra options.

scanners._comment: client_target_map: leave empty for zero-config (dirname == service name). Add overrides only when the client/<dirname>/ folder name doesn't match the target service repo name. Example: if your client folder is 'ai/' but the service is 'ai-adapter', add {"ai": "ai-adapter"}.

settings_key_map: leave empty for zero-config (settings key == service name). Add overrides only when the key in settings.<key>.host doesn't match the target service repo name. Example: 'userService' key → 'user-service' repo, or 'intellectualTutoringService' → 'its'. url_prefix_map and client_name_map have no zero-config fallback — populate them when fetch/axios URLs or client class names are used.
